case_title: SHANNON GALLAGHER VS. 2121 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIAT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 2121 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIAT ION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFNEDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, SHANNON

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 2121 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIAT ION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GALLAGHER, SHANNON AS TO DEFENDANT 2121 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIAT ION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, SHANNON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 2121 LAGUNA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIAT ION PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
